chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1678 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.04.2022 For hearing of MA 7863/11 For hearing of main case Mr., Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Asstt: A.A.G. Mir Shakir Ali Talpur, Advocate holding brief for Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah, Advocate submits that the petitioners have taken away the file from him and perhaps there are other counsel(s) who have been engaged. Despite so many counsel(s) none of them are in attendance. They were also called absent on the last date of hearing i.e. 16.3.2022. On previous dates as well petitioners’ counsel were not regular and punctual in appearance. Hence the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
